source: NSE official RSS (nsearchives.nseindia.com) — corporate announcements, not general market news

recent_announcements.summary: The Exchange has sought clarification from Vikas Lifecare Limited for the quarter ended 30-Jun-2025 with respect to Regulation 33 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. On basis of above the Company is required to clarify the following:  The response of the Company is awaited. |SUBJECT: Clarification - Financial Results
Galaxy Surfactants Limited has informed the Exchange about Notice of Shareholders Meeting for Annual General Meeting to be held on 12-Aug-2026 |SUBJECT: Notice Of Shareholders Meetings-XBRL

Gandhar Oil Refinery (India) Limited has informed the Exchange that Pursuant to Regulation 30 and 47 of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 we are enclosing herewith the copies of Newspaper advertisement with respect to the Notice of Postal Ballot dated July 15th, 2026, published today i.e. on July 17th, 2026 in  Business Standard  (English Newspaper) and  Dainik Nalanda express (Marathi Newspaper) Kindly take the above information in your records. |SUBJECT: Copy of Newspaper Publication

Magson Retail And Distribution Limited has submitted the Exchange a copy Srutinizers report of  Extraordinary General Meeting held on July 15, 2026. Further, the company has informed the Exchange regarding voting results. |SUBJECT: Shareholders meeting
MT Educare Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Intimation of Material Operational Developments'. |SUBJECT: Updates
HDB Financial Services Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Allotment of Securities |SUBJECT: Alteration Of Capital and Fund Raising-XBRL

recent_announcements.company: Sun Pharma Advanced Research Company Limited
recent_announcements.summary: Sun Pharma Advanced Research Company Limited has informed the Exchange about Copy of Newspaper Publication |SUBJECT: Copy of Newspaper Publication

HDB Financial Services Limited has informed the Exchange regarding allotment of 31000 securities pursuant to Non Convertible Securities at its meeting held on July 17, 2026 |SUBJECT: Allotment of Securities
NRB Bearing Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated July 17, 2026. |SUBJECT: Press Release

INDIAN OIL CORPORATION LIMITED has informed the Exchange about Board Meeting to be held on 31-Jul-2026 to inter-alia consider and approve the Unaudited Financial results of the Company for the Quarterly ended June 2026 . |SUBJECT: Board Meeting Intimation
Aaron Industries Limited has informed the Exchange about Board Meeting to be held on 24-Jul-2026 to consider Other business. |SUBJECT: Board Meeting Intimation
Copy of Newspaper Publication |SUBJECT: Copy of Newspaper Publication

Radico Khaitan Limited has informed the Exchange about Board Meeting to be held on 28-Jul-2026 to inter-alia consider and approve the Unaudited Financial results of the Company for the Quarterly ended June 2026 . |SUBJECT: Board Meeting Intimation

The South Indian Bank Limited has informed the Exchange about Intimation under Regulation 30 & 47 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements), Regulations, 2015 |SUBJECT: Copy of Newspaper Publication

CLEAN SCIENCE AND TECHNOLOGY LIMITED has informed the Exchange about Board Meeting to be held on 01-Aug-2026 to inter-alia consider and approve the Unaudited Financial results of the Company for the Quarterly ended June 2026 . |SUBJECT: Board Meeting Intimation
